---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[FEAT] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: Likhith252002
---

## ✨ Feature Summary

A clear and concise description of the feature you'd like to see.

---

## 🎯 Problem It Solves

What problem does this feature address? What is currently painful or missing?

---

## 💡 Proposed Solution

Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible.

---

## 🔄 Alternatives Considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about.

---

## 🏗️ Which Part of the App?

- [ ] Frontend UI
- [ ] Backend API
- [ ] Agent logic (Research / Quant / Bull / Bear / Decision)
- [ ] LangGraph pipeline
- [ ] Market data / tools
- [ ] Deployment / infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation

---

## 📎 Additional Context

Screenshots, mockups, links to similar projects, or anything else relevant.
